subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant and servant of the Testament! On the Day of Ridván a vast pavilion was raised in a lofty central place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق و خادم پیمان در یوم رضوان سراپرده وسیع در مرکزی رفیع مقابل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @Shrines and Holy places, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
